title: The President’s Cake
synopsis: “We've gone from one egg each to one egg for a whole family.” In 1990s, Iraq suffered from military and economic sanctions, commodities such as eggs and flour were luxurious. Yet President Saddam Hussein demanded the entire nation to celebrate his birthday. 9-year-old Lamia was chosen by her school to bake a birthday cake for the President. Lamia followed her grandmother into the city to hunt for cake ingredients. Along the way, Lamia encountered the seamy side of human nature with bitter reality, contrasted with the sweetness of friendship and resilience. Winner of Golden Camera and Directors’ Fortnight Audience Award at Cannes Film Festival.

synopsis_lang.en: “We've gone from one egg each to one egg for a whole family.” In 1990s, Iraq suffered from military and economic sanctions, commodities such as eggs and flour were luxurious. Yet President Saddam Hussein demanded the entire nation to celebrate his birthday. 9-year-old Lamia was chosen by her school to bake a birthday cake for the President. Lamia followed her grandmother into the city to hunt for cake ingredients. Along the way, Lamia encountered the seamy side of human nature with bitter reality, contrasted with the sweetness of friendship and resilience. Winner of Golden Camera and Directors’ Fortnight Audience Award at Cannes Film Festival.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
雞蛋三隻，糖呢一百茶匙，仲有啲麵粉添。一嚿蛋糕，大銀幕先食得出極權嘅苦同童真嘅甜。康城影展首部獲獎的伊拉克電影！導演哈珊夏迪自編自導，將兒時所聞拍成首部長片，一舉奪下金攝影機獎及導演雙週觀眾票選獎。

1990年伊拉克飽受軍事和經濟制裁，雞蛋和麵粉都是奢侈品，總統薩達姆侯賽因卻下令全國為他慶生，違者嚴懲。與祖母相依為命的九歲女孩娜米，被抽中代表學校為總統製作生日蛋糕。她隨祖母到城鎮購買食材，誓要完成這項國家任務。沿途她與祖母分離，目睹人性冷暖與醜惡，幸得好友沙伊同甘共苦，黑暗中依然找到微光。哈珊夏迪透過孩童稚嫩的眼光，溫柔寫實的鏡頭細膩呈現獨裁統治下的苦澀，以及友情與童真的甘甜。

cast: Baneen Ahmad Nayyef, Sajad Mohamad Qasem, Waheed Thabet Khreibat, Rahim AlHaj

cast_lang.en: Baneen Ahmad Nayyef, Sajad Mohamad Qasem, Waheed Thabet Khreibat, Rahim AlHaj
cast_lang.zh_hk: 巴恩艾哈邁德納耶夫、薩賈德穆罕默德卡森、華希德塔比特奎百特、拉希姆阿爾哈伊

subtitle: Chinese,English
